title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: podman bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for podman is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: [RFE] Explicit addition of the port to firewalld by the admin before forwarding
[Podman v5.5] Importing a tar.xz archive as a container fails with error 'layer 0 <...> does not match config's DiffID'
[Podman v5.6] podman: Retry if Registry Returns 5xx HTTP Errors
[podman-5.5] Infra container in a pod is stopped before application container
[podman 5.6] Tweaking mount flags on host root directory before unmounting  errors
Rootless Podman cannot run pods on systems with rpm-plugin-ima installed
[podman-5.6] Podman container created through the Compat API cannot resolve names from host machine's /etc/hosts
Customer needs the improved `podman system check --quick` to do image repair at node startup.

full_text:
An update for podman is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
